synopsis:
"A Youth Unpromising" (German title "Ein Junge ohne Aussichten") is a comic strip written by Jeremy Barlow, drawn by Ingo Römling and edited by Gunther Nickel. The story was published in the 35th issue of the German Star Wars Rebels Magazine, which was released on August 30, 2017.
It has never received an official English translation
title: A Youth Unpromising
